---
title: "Greek Honey Garlic Chicken Paidakia"
author: "Chris Kornaros"
date: 2026-03-06
categories: ["Chicken"]
---

**Ingredients:**

-   3lbs chicken thighs (or you can use an entire chicken broken down)

-   1 red onion sliced

-   5-6 cloves of garlic in quarters

-   Salt to taste

-   Pepper

-   Thyme

-   Oregano

-   Papirka

-   Bay Leaves

-   Turmeric

-   ½ cup of honey

-   Lemon juice from a whole lemon

-   3 tbsp mustard

-   Olive oil

**Directions:**

1.  Preheat the oven to 400°F. Add everything into a dutch oven or
    roasting pot. Mix the ingredients well and then coat all sides of
    the chicken.

2.  Cover and bake at 400°F for 45-60 minutes. Then remove and serve
    over rice or a salad.
